name: Trivia Mind Game
description: Get ready for fast thinking and quick decisions in Trivia Mind Game! Face challenging questions under pressure and choose the correct answer before time runs out. Every wrong choice makes your crowd fall—one mistake can change everything. Test your brain with fun, fast-paced trivia that sharpens your decision-making skills. Stay focused, think smart, and push your limits as questions get trickier each round. Build your winning streak, avoid the falling floor, and prove you have what it takes to become the ultimate trivia champion. Step in, make the right choice, and rise to victory!
instructions: Tap on the correct answer to choose Each question has limited time mdash act fast Wrong answer players fall Keep selecting correct answers to progress Game ends when all players fall
